doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The “HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL” text makes highly specific, likely incorrect legal assertions and includes unverified branding/series details that are not consistent with reliably verifiable HUD institutional documents.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
